description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City Cool Rest Spots

From April 22 to October 28, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Hanno City is opening air-conditioned public facilities and cooperating shops as temporary rest areas. You can use them free of charge during business hours. Take advantage of these spots to rest and prevent heat stroke when you're out.

Over 40 facilities are participating across the city's districts: Hanno, Daini, Seimei, Soyanagi, Kaji, Misugi-dai, Minami-Kōma, Agano, Higashi-Agano, Haraichiba, and Nagurib. Participating facilities include district administrative centers, libraries, museums, clinics, welfare centers, and pharmacies.

Each facility has different opening days and hours. Please check the facility list for details before visiting.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/9927.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Cool Rest Spots (April 22 – October 28, 2026)
